summary: Tested Empresa role restrictions for Asomunicipios Catastral System. 11/12 backend tests passed. Found 1 BUG: Empresa role CAN create predios via POST /api/predios (should return 403). Frontend UI correctly hides buttons for Empresa role.

critical.issue: Empresa role CAN create predios directly via API. The endpoint only blocks 'usuario' role but not 'empresa' or 'comunicaciones' roles. Line 9362 in server.py only checks for UserRole.USUARIO.
critical.fix_suggestion: Add UserRole.EMPRESA and UserRole.COMUNICACIONES to the role check at line 9362: if current_user['role'] in [UserRole.USUARIO, UserRole.COMUNICACIONES, UserRole.EMPRESA]:

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Update POST /api/predios endpoint (line 9362 in server.py) to block 'empresa' and 'comunicaciones' roles from creating predios
critical_code_review_comments: ✗ POST /api/predios does NOT block 'empresa' role - BUG
✓ Frontend correctly hides 'Exportar Excel' button for 'empresa' role
✓ Frontend correctly hides 'Nuevo Predio' button for 'empresa' role
✓ Frontend correctly hides Edit/Delete buttons for 'empresa' role
✓ Frontend shows View (Eye) buttons for 'empresa' role (read-only access)
✓ Dashboard shows correct message for 'empresa' role: 'Como empresa aliada, puedes consultar información catastral...'
✓ Empresa user can view predios list (GET /api/predios)
✓ Empresa user can view predio detail (GET /api/predios/{id})
✓ New UI for cambios propuestos compares datos_propuestos vs predio_actual (only shows fields that actually changed)
seed_data_creation: Test predios created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Empresa role restrictions testing completed. Found 1 critical bug: POST /api/predios allows empresa role to create predios (should be blocked). The fix is simple: add UserRole.EMPRESA and UserRole.COMUNICACIONES to the role check at line 9362 in server.py. Frontend UI correctly hides all modification buttons for empresa role. The new cambios historial UI correctly compares datos_propuestos vs predio_actual to only show fields that actually changed.

empresa_role_ui_restrictions.Dashboard message: ✓ Shows 'Como empresa aliada, puedes consultar información catastral...'

cambios_historial_ui.only_changed_fields: ✓ Only shows fields that actually changed
cambios_historial_ui.fields_compared: nombre_propietario, direccion, destino_economico, area_terreno, area_construida, avaluo, tipo_documento, numero_documento

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Empresa role can create predios via POST /api/predios
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The create_predio endpoint at line 9362 in server.py only checks for UserRole.USUARIO but does not include UserRole.EMPRESA or UserRole.COMUNICACIONES in the permission check
reproduction_steps: 1. Login as empresa_test@test.com with password Test123!
2. Send POST request to /api/predios with valid predio data
3. Observe that the predio is created successfully (returns 200) instead of being blocked (403)
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Update line 9362 in server.py to: if current_user['role'] in [UserRole.USUARIO, UserRole.COMUNICACIONES, UserRole.EMPRESA]:
